resolution_steps: 1. Click on 'Teams' in the sidebar menu. 2. Select 'Admin' based on the current shift timing. 3. Click the 'Send & Assign' button. 4. Click on 'Dashboard'from the sidebar menu. 5. Click the 'Resolve' button for the same error.

1. Click on 'Cart' from the sidebar menu. 2. Select any three random item options. 3. Click the 'Download' button. 4. Click the 'Send Email' button. 5. Click the 'Send Now' button. 6. Click on 'Dashboard' from the sidebar menu. 7. Click the 'Resolve' button for the same error.

1. Click on 'Customer Detail' from the sidebar menu. 2. Locate the 'Missing/Incorrect Credentials Detected' card and identify the reported email ID shown there. 3. Enter the same reported email ID into the email input field. 4. Click the 'Verify & Send Correction' button. 5. Click on 'Dashboard' from the sidebar menu. 6. Click the 'Resolve' button for the same error.
